message:
fix(codegen): Fix inline block migration by adding NativeCodegen wrappers

Problem:
- Previous migration used b.emitInlineBlockStart/End() which wrote to builder's buffer
- Builder's buffer never merged with codegen's output during statement/expression generation
- Generated code was missing inline block wrappers entirely

Solution:
- Added emitInlineBlockStart/End() wrapper methods in NativeCodegen (core.zig:1611, 1619)
- Wrappers use builder for label generation but emit to codegen output
- Bulk replaced b.emitInlineBlockStart → self.emitInlineBlockStart (99 files)
- Bulk replaced b.emitInlineBlockEnd → self.emitInlineBlockEnd (99 files)
- Cleaned up unused builder declarations (28 files)

Verification:
- ✓ Compiler builds with 0 errors
- ✓ Generated code has proper inline block wrappers (__m{id}_{hint}: { ... })
- ✓ Tests: int_literal PASS, unary PASS
- ✓ 866 usages of new wrapper methods
- ✓ 0 old-style patterns remaining

Fixes inline block generation across all codegen modules.
